questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: The famous bakery chain advertising that it used natural ingredients apologized to the public after it was caught using flavoring in its baked goods.
options: hollow
plastic
vivid
artificial

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: The H1N1 affects many people at the same time and soon spreads from one person to another, which worries many local people in Taiwan.
options: epidemic
fragrance
misery
barrier

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: A Pakistani TV show in which the host gives abandoned babies is causing among viewers for turning children into prizes, but the show’s producer says that it is a good deed to make childless parents happy.
options: controversy
conversation
conservation
constitution

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Thanks to the advancement in biotechnology, scientists successfully cloned the sheep Dolly, which looked to a real one so that you could hardly believe that it was actually a cloned sheep.
options: identical
magnificent
contrary
abstract

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Lack of sleep and prolonged exposure to extreme cold can lower the body’s resistance to bacteria, thus opening the way for a(n).
options: affection
digestion
confession
infection

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: The poorly-operated company finally announced bankruptcy after facing a series of financial difficulties that had appeared one after another.
options: emerged
pioneered
invested
flourished

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Complaints about the government’s failure to boost the depressed economy are increasing with more and more people losing their jobs.
options: down to the earth
in memory of
on the rise
on verge of

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: The iPhone has become an indispensable part of Tom’s daily life, and he never goes anywhere without it.
options: available
individual
essential
sufficient

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Seeing his wife talking on the phone secretly, Jimmy became suspicious about what his wife was up to.
options: shabby
doubtful
predictable
fascinating

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Before she saved sufficient money to buy a house of her own, she lived in her sister’s provisionally. But she planned to move out in one year.
options: temporarily
permanently
unfortunately
carefully

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Jack: Do you see Mike’s new girlfriend? She’s so hot and gorgeous. Mary: Well, I don’t think so. I met her once. She was rude and superficial. Jack: What can I say? Mike is so much into her.
options: Shame on you.
Beauty is in the eyes of the beholder.
I have no clue of what you want.
The lovely girl turned on the charm to you.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Lorna: Boy! I’m cramming formulas and figures for our tomorrow’s test. What about you, Charlie? Charlie: Well,, Lorna. Lorna: You’ve got to think positively, Charlie. Think positively! Charlie: I can’t. The math questions exhausted me completely, but I still didn’t get them.
options: I should look on the bright side of life
most students think they can pass without cracking a book
I stayed up late to get caught up with my homework
I think I’m going to fail the test

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Woman: Man: Frankly, I never worked before. I’ve been unemployed since I graduated from the university. Woman: I see. The job market is very bad indeed. Man: I sincerely hope I’ll have the opportunity to work for your company.
options: Why didn’t you hand in your resume yesterday?
Were you an active student in extracurricular activity in college?
Please tell me some of your working experiences.
Please tell me your opinions about the stock market in Asia.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Student: Hi, where’s Mr. Wu? You’re not our new English teacher, are you, sir? Teacher: No, I am just a substitute teacher for a day while Mr. Wu is away. Student: Away? Teacher: No, he just felt a little fatigued and needed some rest. He might go back to school tomorrow.
options: I think you are very glad to hear that, aren’t you?
Is there anything wrong with him?
What subject do you teach?
May I leave him a message?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Tim: You’ve been pretty stressful recently. There’s a jazz concert tonight. How about going together to relax? Cindy: Sounds like fun. Thanks for being such a nice friend and caring about me so much. Tim: Both of us are under a lot of pressure. Cindy: That’s why we need friends. Tim: You said it! See you tonight.
options: I am so proud of you.
We are in the same boat.
Out of sight, out of mind.
In your dreams!

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Alan: Have you ever heard the saying, “Clothes make the man”? It might be truer than we imagine. Carroll: When police officers or firefighters put on their uniform, it will affect their mental state. It probably gives them a sense of responsibility and authority. Alan: Absolutely. Carroll: Yeah, I think everyone recognizes that part about the power of clothes.
options: You are what you wear.
It costs a lot to keep up with the fashion.
It’s what on the inside that counts.
Never judge a person from his appearance.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Jim: How was the party last night? Lucy: Awesome. But He said he had to work overtime. Jim: That’s too bad. Did you still have a good time? Lucy: Yes. It’s Ok. That’s just him. He’s a workaholic.
options: I have to hand in the assignment today.
my boyfriend stood me up.
I was grounded by my parents.
my dad is going to throw a party next Saturday.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Roy: Our TV is broken, Daddy. Daddy: Mmm..., Roy. We can read a book instead. Roy: Good idea, Daddy. How about the telephone book? So we can pick out a good repairman to fix our TV!
options: The president will be on the air this evening
English taught by TV is very helpful to you
Could you turn down the radio? I can’t hear you
That will give us a chance to do something else together

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Mary: Hey, Jake. Are you ready for your trip? Jake: Well, not really. I still have to buy some clothes. Mary: Jake: It’s really hot in summer, so I am going to buy some shorts, sandals, and t-shirts.
options: What’s the weather like where you are going?
Is that an emergency call?
Do you need any clothing for formal occasions?
Have you booked your flight ticket already?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Store clerk: Hi, may I help you? Customer: Yes, I’d like to rent these movies. Store clerk: Ok. Let’s see...your total tonight comes to seven dollars and fifty cents. Customer: Store clerk: They have to be returned before Thursday by 10 o’clock. There’s an overdue charge equal to the rental fee of the movies. Be sure to return them on time.
options: Have we met before? You look familiar.
Here’s my membership card. Is there any discount?
When is the best time to rent the videos?
When do I need to return them?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following is true?
options: Humans and pandas have shared the land peacefully.
A female panda can give birth to 4 to 5 cubs every year.
People in Taiwan weren’t interested in the birth of the baby panda.
The bamboo is the primary source of food for a giant panda.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What is the main idea of the passage?
options: The Taipei Zoo is celebrating the birth of the baby panda.
Humans have killed animals for thousands of years and they have recently begun to kill pandas.
Human intervention and the panda’s low birthrate are two contributing factors for the decline of panda population.
To save the lovely endangered species, teenage students don’t get much to do at the moment.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following word has the opposite meaning of “ endangered ” in the first paragraph?
options: safe
threatened
scared
lovely

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: From the passage, we can assume that.
options: there are more plants alive than animals today
there are more and more endangered animals
people hate giant pandas
the panda needs helps from humans so that it won’t become extinct

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What do the zoo keepers do to protect the baby panda from dying?
options: They put up a camera to monitor the mother panda.
They double the amount of the bamboo for the mother panda.
They take the baby panda away from its mother.
We can’t find any information from the article.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What is the passage mainly about?
options: Reasons for the popular concept of time travel in fictions.
How to learn history and physics well at the same time.
The possibility and the potential risk of time travel.
What the world would be like in the far future.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, which of the following statements is true?
options: Time travel means to travel between different points in distance.
The grandfather paradox says time travel is impossible because your grandfather could kill you.
H.G. Wells’ time traveler goes back to 30 million years ago and sees a crab wandering on the beach.
A time machine appears in a novel written by H.G. Wells.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following words could best be used to replace “ tantalizing ”?
options: rewarding
tempting
imaginary
teasing

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, what is the term given to the shortcuts through space and time that might be possibly used for time travel?
options: Einstein’s theory of relativity.
Wormholes.
The speed of light.
A time machine.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: We may infer from the author’s tone that this passage is supposed to be written to.
options: raise funds for time traveling project
tell a story about how he traveled through time
make an experiment with spaceship
share information about time traveling 第貳部分:非選擇題 ( 第 1 至 5 題,每題 4 分,共 20 分 ) 一、填充 說明:請依據中文之提示,在空格內填入適當之詞彙以完成句子。每格限填一字,並將答案寫在 「答案卷」之指定範圍內。
